name: Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc.
summary: Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc. is a commercial specialty property and casualty insurance company founded in 2020. It offers casualty, professional liability, healthcare liability, and small-business (Baleen Specialty) insurance products primarily on an excess and surplus lines basis. Products are distributed through wholesale and retail channels via two models: a craft underwriting model for complex risks and a digital model for smaller, scalable risks. Policies are issued on AmFam paper and 100% reinsured to Bowhead's own insurance subsidiary.

products.name: Casualty Insurance
products.description: Primary and excess general liability and environmental liability coverage for construction, manufacturing, real estate, hospitality, and other industries via wholesale channels.

products.name: Professional Liability Insurance
products.description: Management liability, D&O, E&O, EPL, fiduciary, crime, and cyber liability products for financial institutions and nonprofits on admitted and E&S basis.

products.name: Healthcare Liability Insurance
products.description: Professional, general, and management liability coverage for hospitals, medical facilities, senior care providers, and managed care organizations.

products.name: Baleen Specialty
products.description: Technology-powered digital underwriting for small to mid-sized non-admitted general liability risks in construction and real estate via wholesale-only distribution.

products.name: Express
products.description: Digital underwriting model for small cyber liability and miscellaneous professional liability products launched in 2025.

partnerships.partner_name: American Family Mutual Insurance Company, S.I. (AmFam)
partnerships.description: Strategic partner providing insurance paper for policy issuance in all 50 states; policies issued under AmFam name and 100% reinsured to Bowhead's subsidiary BICI.

partnerships.partner_name: GPC Partners Investments (SPV III) LP (Gallatin Point Capital)
partnerships.description: Private equity fund that provided founding capital for Bowhead at inception in September 2020.
